name: anti-vibe-coding
description: Plugin de desenvolvimento disciplinado com conhecimentos de programador senior. v7.5.0 — System Design Coverage Gaps: fecha os 3 buracos de System Design via sintese de corpus senior (32 fontes, 573 atomos). Onda 1 Filas/Mensageria — 3 references novas em system-design (messaging-models, messaging-reliability, messaging-operations) + secao 9 + cross-link AMQP. Onda 2 SQL-internals + DNS-routing — 3 references SQL (sql-indexing-and-storage, sql-acid-and-durability, sql-query-planning com EXPLAIN/particionamento de doc oficial PostgreSQL) + secao 10 + dns-hosting estendido (7 politicas Route 53, secoes 8-9) + replication-sharding (surge-replacement). Onda 3 Resiliencia (enriquecimento, ZERO reference nova) — defensive-patterns (5 categorias: circuit breaker/timeout/fallback/retry/health check), system-design secao 11 Resiliencia Distribuida + Shuffle Sharding, infrastructure Blue-Green Deploy. 9 conflitos senior (C1-C9) resolvidos via tensao+regra (D4); toda afirmacao citada (fonte); audit global CA-01 zero descarte silencioso (32/32 fontes); advisor do hooks.json passa a listar defensive-patterns + infrastructure (corrige omissao). v7.4.0 — Skill Parity Refresh: novo agente code-reviewer (frota 13→14, correctness+readability a nivel de linha) + ~81 grafts adversarialmente verificados em 19 skills e 3 agents (copy-then-improve, zero regressao de conteudo). v7.3.0 — Next.js Stack Knowledge. PRIMEIRA stack knowledge completa em ingles (D15): 15 atoms em knowledge/nextjs/atoms/ extraidos de 9 fontes declaradas com anti-drift clause + verifier batch (94% rastreabilidade, 0 rework rounds). T1 (7): app-router-and-layouts, react-server-components, server-actions-and-mutations, middleware-and-edge, security-stack-specific, react-hooks-and-state. T2 (6): data-fetching-and-cache, rendering-strategies, performance-and-turbopack, testing-strategy, ui-and-styling, error-handling-observability, react-suspense-patterns. T3 (2): pages-router-migration-tips, supabase-integration. DETECTOR: nextjs e react como StackIds distintos; STACK_ID_TO_MATRIX_FOLDER['nextjs']='nextjs' (era 'nodejs-typescript'); probeReact com vite.config+react guard (G8 false-positive); detectMultiStack inclui next.config.{js,ts} como anchor nextjs-especifico. PARSER: format-knowledge-preview.ts regex (?:Por|By) aceita INDEX em EN alem de PT-BR (RF-11, backward-compat). INFRA: THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md (MIT attribution para 6 SKILL.md V2); knowledge/nextjs/INDEX.md (By Cross-Stack Skill / By Tier / By keyword); 2 fixtures (nextjs-app-router-fixture, nextjs-supabase-fixture); 2 E2E (init-v7-nextjs-tracer-bullet 11 testes, init-v7-nextjs-supabase 3 testes). COMPOUND: 2026-05-25-stack-knowledge-extraction-workflow.md — workflow parallel waves + anti-drift + verifier validado em 14 atoms, template reusavel para futuras stacks (Go, Elixir).
